subcodes.first_line: O thou who dost proclaim the mention of God in this divine century, which, like the sun upon Sinai, doth cast its rays upon all the ages [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بذکرالله در این قرن الهی که چون آفتاب در سیناء سائر قرون اشعه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual transformation, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
